{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Monkey
|class_id=22765
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This magnificent statue of a monkey is cast in pure gold carefully selected for its quality. It exudes an air of opulence, while showcasing intricate craftsmanship that brings out every detail, right down to the individual strands of fur. As a result, its value as a collectible has skyrocketed, captivating collectors from all walks of life!
|fame=72
|art=68
|fth=59
|civ=107
|tech=56
|ss1=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +9<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss2=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +12<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss3=Snail Leadership +8<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +15<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss4=Snail Leadership +10<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +21<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +21<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss5=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +27<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +27<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss6=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +36<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +36<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss7=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +36<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +36<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000<br>Snail Leadership +10 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, CRIT DMG +15%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, B-tads gained +15%
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, INTEL gained +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Spirit of the Dev Team|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Lead Monkey|3rec=0.38M|3atk=9869|3defense=6598|3hp=35564|3weak=2936
|4name=Iron Monkey|4rec=0.83M|4atk=18564|4defense=12411|4hp=126062|4weak=4594
|5name=Bronze Monkey|5rec=1.77M|5atk=30548|5defense=20422|5hp=345083|5weak=7134
|6name=Silver Monkey|6rec=3.58M|6atk=46188|6defense=30878|6hp=713665|6weak=10213
|Arec=6.78M|Aatk=65904|Adefense=44058|Ahp=1328171|Aweak=12446
}}}}
